name: brooks-lint
description: AI code reviews grounded in twelve classic engineering books — decay risk diagnostics with book citations, severity labels, and six analysis modes (PR review, architecture audit, tech debt, test quality, health dashboard, full-sweep auto-fix)
author: hyhmrright

commands.description: PR-level code review across six decay risk dimensions
Full architecture audit with module dependency map
Tech debt classification ranked by Pain × Spread
Test suite health review across six test decay risks
Combined health dashboard aggregating all four quality dimensions (PR review, architecture, tech debt, test quality) into a single weighted score
Full sweep: run all analysis dimensions in one pass and auto-fix safe findings, confirming risky ones
